Celebrating 5 Years Of Partnership With Microsoft: A Monumental Moment In Techno Brain’s Journey
April 30, 2024

Africa’s First Microsoft Testing Center

Five years ago, Techno Brain celebrated the grand opening of Africa’s first Microsoft Testing Center, a moment that would leave an indelible mark on the world of technology in the continent. The inauguration of the Testing Center was a star-studded event, graced by the presence of Techno Brain’s CEO, Manoj Shanker, and the now President of Kenya, William S. Ruto. Their participation underscored the significance of this partnership, not only for Techno Brain but for Kenya as a whole.

Fast forward to today, it’s evident that the spirit of innovation and collaboration, which we ignited with the launch of Africa’s first Microsoft Testing Center, has continued to shape our journey. Notably, as we celebrated Amazon’s recent achievement with the launch of their AWS Development Center in Kenya, it drew a meaningful connection to our own partnership.

Amazon’s partnership with the Kenyan government in launching a development center echoes the collaborative approach we took in establishing Africa’s first Microsoft Testing Center. It underscores the pivotal role that technology companies like ourselves play in fostering growth and innovation on the continent.

This significant synergy between these two endeavors emphasizes our ongoing dedication to fostering an environment of mutual support and advancement within the tech community, reinforcing our commitment to shaping the future of technology in Africa and beyond.

As we celebrate five years of partnership with Microsoft, Techno Brain remains committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation. The journey ahead promises even more exciting developments and opportunities for the tech community in Africa and beyond.
